hero.headline: Wedding Invitations Your Guests Will Remember
hero.subheadline: The digital platform for couples. Create, share, and manage wedding invitations with ease.
hero.free_note: Free for first 50 couples. Join the waitlist.

problem.title: Traditional Wedding Cards? Troublesome
problem.description: Print hundreds of cards, deliver one by one, last-minute updates? Waste of time, money, and energy. Guests forget to bring them, end up in trash.

solution.title: Digital Cards? Super Easy
solution.description: Create in 5 minutes, share with one link. Guests RSVP directly from their phone. All data in one dashboard.

hook.title: A Wedding to Remember, Without the Stress
hook.description: Focus on what matters. Celebrate your love. Let Jemputan Digital handle the logistics. More time for memories, less time for admin.

features.section_sub: From beautiful invitations to guest management — we handle everything so you can enjoy the moment.

custom_link.title: Custom Link
custom_link.description: Your own personal link. Beautiful, easy to share and goes straight to your wedding invitation.

live_preview.title: Edit & Preview Live
live_preview.description: Make changes and see the result instantly. No reloading needed.

rsvp_analytics.title: RSVP & Analytics
rsvp_analytics.description: Know who is attending, how many and where they are from. All in a clear dashboard.

wishes.title: Real-time Wishes
wishes.description: Guests can leave wishes. You read and keep those sweet memories forever.

wishlist_store.title: Shopee & Lazada Wishlist
wishlist_store.description: Share your gift list directly from Shopee or Lazada. Guests know exactly what you want.

donation.title: Donation QR & Bank
donation.description: Receive contributions via QR code or bank account number. Simple and gracious.

excel.title: Import & Export Excel
excel.description: Have a guest list in Excel? Import it directly. Export anytime. Fully flexible.

lifetime.title: Lifetime Access
lifetime.description: Pay once and use forever. No monthly fees. No hidden subscriptions.

rsvp.title: RSVP Tracking
rsvp.description: Know who is coming, how many. Export to Excel with one click.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.description: Guests can choose and buy gifts from Shopee/Lazada. No duplicate gifts.

multi_manager.title: Couple Edit Together
multi_manager.description: Both can edit together. No more 'Honey, you handle it' drama.

mobile_first.title: Perfect on Phone
mobile_first.description: 9:16 aspect ratio, designed for Instagram story feel. Looks great on mobile.

how_it_works.section_sub: From signing up to sharing in under 10 minutes.

step1.title: Pick a Theme
step1.description: Choose from a variety of beautiful wedding themes that can be customised to match your event style.

step2.title: Fill in Details
step2.description: Enter your event information, time, venue and guest list. All in one simple view.

step3.title: Share & Monitor
step3.description: Share your link via WhatsApp and track RSVPs and wishes live from anywhere.

usps.save_time: Focus on wedding prep, not admin

usps.data_driven: Know exactly who's coming, who's not

t1.quote: So easy to use! Beautiful link, guests loved it. All RSVPs came in within 2 days. Thank you Jemputan Digital!
t1.name: Nur Syafiqah

t2.quote: I love the wishlist feature! Guests know exactly what to get. The RSVP dashboard is super clear. Can track everyone.
t2.name: Haziq & Liyana

t3.quote: Way more modern than paper cards! I can read back the wishes from guests anytime. Memories that last.
t3.name: Farah Aziz

q1.question: How long does it take to set up?
q1.answer: Just 5 minutes! Sign up with Google, choose a template, fill in details, done. If you want to customize more (colors, music, wishlist), it might take 10-15 minutes.

q2.question: Can guests RSVP without an account?
q2.answer: Yes! Guests only need to click the link, fill the RSVP form, done. No sign up required for guests.

q3.question: How does the wishlist work?
q3.answer: You add wishlist items from Shopee/Lazada, our system tracks guest selections. When a guest picks an item, we disable it. No duplicate gifts!

q4.question: Where can I share the link?
q4.answer: Anywhere! WhatsApp, Instagram story, Facebook, email. Wherever you want. The link is yours to share.

q5.question: What if guests don't have smartphones?
q5.answer: The link works on desktop too. The design is responsive, so it looks good everywhere. But realistically, 95% of Malaysians have smartphones now.

q6.question: Is guest data secure?
q6.answer: 100%. We follow Malaysian data protection standards. Your data is safe.

q7.question: Can I get a refund?
q7.answer: Since it's a digital product and you get instant access, no refunds. But we have a free preview/trial mode so you can test before paying.

q8.question: What languages are available?
q8.answer: Malay and English. You can set the default language, and guests can switch if they want.
